# datadog_gcp_uc_configs (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about existing Datadog gcp uc configs.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `gcp_uc_configs` (Block List) A Google Cloud Usage Cost config. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--gcp_uc_configs))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--gcp_uc_configs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `gcp_uc_configs`

Read-Only:

- `account_id` (String) The Google Cloud account ID.
- `bucket_name` (String) The Google Cloud bucket name used to store the Usage Cost export.
- `dataset` (String) The export dataset name used for the Google Cloud Usage Cost Report.
- `error_messages` (List of String) The error messages for the Google Cloud Usage Cost config.
- `export_prefix` (String) The export prefix used for the Google Cloud Usage Cost Report.
- `export_project_name` (String) The name of the Google Cloud Usage Cost Report.
- `id` (String) The ID of the Google Cloud Usage Cost config.
- `months` (Number) The number of months the report has been backfilled.
- `project_id` (String) The `project_id` of the Google Cloud Usage Cost report.
- `service_account` (String) The unique Google Cloud service account email.
- `status` (String) The status of the Google Cloud Usage Cost config.
- `status_updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the Google Cloud Usage Cost config status was updated.
